backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing family registration system with user profiles, family CRUD operations, summary statistics, and role-based access control (admin/user/guest permissions).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features with file mappings, components, and test IDs for the Raya theme design system, navigation, family registration form, and admin dashboard.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-existing summaries of all frontend source files describing components, hooks, and utilities for the Raya Trip 2026 application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for Raya aesthetic (cream, emerald green, soft gold).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script import for the React application titled 'SAID Raya Trip 2026'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication, tab navigation (Daftar/Summary/Admin), profile setup modal, and rendering header/footer with conditional admin access.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin-only dashboard with searchable family table, delete/reset actions with confirmation modals, and CSV export functionality using custom utility.
Component rendering animated counting number using custom useCountUp hook with configurable target value and duration.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmationModa: A reusable confirmation dialog component using AlertDialog from shadcn/ui with loading state support and customizable title, message, and confirm button text.
frontend/src/components/DaftarKeluarga.t: Family registration form component that collects family name, food platter, number of members, and individual member names, then submits to backend using the useAddFamily hook.
frontend/src/components/FamilyBarChart.t: Bar chart component that visualizes the number of family members per family using Recharts library.
frontend/src/components/FamilyCard.tsx: Card component displaying individual family details including family name, member count, food platter, and list of all family members.
frontend/src/components/FoodPieChart.tsx: Pie chart component that displays food distribution breakdown using Recharts with custom color scheme and percentage labels.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and query cache invalidation on logout.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Tab navigation component with three tabs (Daftar Keluarga, Summary Raya, Admin Dashboard) where admin tab is conditionally shown based on user role.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup that prompts for name input and saves using useSaveCallerUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/StatisticCard.ts: Simple card component for displaying a statistic with label, value, and optional subtitle with hover animation effects.
frontend/src/components/SummaryRaya.tsx: Main summary dashboard displaying animated attendance counter, statistics cards, food pie chart, family bar chart, and list of all registered families.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication and automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminCheck.ts: React Query hook that checks if the current authenticated user has admin privileges by calling the backend isCallerAdmin method.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: Custom hook that animates a number from 0 to target value over specified duration using requestAnimationFrame with easing function.
frontend/src/hooks/useFamilies.ts: React Query hook that fetches all registered families from the backend with automatic refetching every 5 seconds for real-time updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useFamilyMutations.ts: Provides React Query mutation hooks for family CRUD operations (add, update, delete, reset) that interact with the actor and invalidate related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useFoodBreakdown.ts: React Query hook that fetches food breakdown statistics from the actor, returning an array of food types with their counts, with auto-refetch every 5 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useSummaryStats.ts: React Query hook that fetches summary statistics from the actor with automatic refetching every 5 seconds and on window focus.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving the current user's profile, with query invalidation on successful save.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom Raya-themed color variables for light and dark modes, plus custom animations for fade-in, slide-down, and count-up effects.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function that combines clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class name merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/utils/excelExport.ts: Exports family data to CSV format with three sections: raw member data, summary statistics, and food breakdown counts.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup capabilities.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color palette (including Raya theme colors: cream, green, gold), extended theme settings with OKLCH color system, container queries, typography plugin, custom animations (accordion), and responsive breakpoints.
project_state.json: Project state document tracking the SAID Raya Trip 2026 web application architecture, including database schema (family_raya table), design system specifications (cream/emerald/gold theme), implemented features (family registration, summary statistics, admin dashboard, Excel export), and animation timings.
